forecast.name: Memorial Day
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely and areas of fog before 1pm, then areas of fog and a chance of rain showers between 1pm and 4pm. Cloudy, with a high near 71. Northwest wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 57. West wind around 7 mph.

weather_report:
As the day unfolds in Boston, a veil of grey envelops the city, creating an atmosphere that is both melancholic and serene. The forecast whispers of rain showers that could weave through the afternoon, accompanied by stubborn patches of fog that linger in the nooks of the city. With a temperature hovering near a modest 71 degrees, the air has a soft humidity that may occasionally kiss your skin, though it is not entirely unpleasant. The northwest breeze that carries a gentle coolness offers a respite from the humidity, making it a time to pull on a light jacket or cardigan.

In the midst of this cloudy embrace, the day invites you to embrace the quieter pleasures it holds. Perhaps an afternoon stroll along the esplanade would be fitting, as the fog adds an ethereal touch to the waters of the Charles River, mirroring the city’s heart in a dreamlike state. Alternatively, curling up in a cozy café with a good book might provide the perfect sanctuary from the unpredictable elements outside. At this moment in time, don't let the clouds dissuade your plans; instead, allow them to paint the backdrop of a uniquely beautiful day.
